features.featureTitle: Replace the static sensitivity values (General: 176, Red Dot: 98, 2x: 190, 4x: 190) with randomly generated values. Generate a new random set of sensitivity values each time the Generate button is clicked. The random values should be within sensible gaming sensitivity ranges: General (50-200), Red Dot (50-150), 2x (100-250), 4x (100-250).
